description: Predict demand, optimize inventory, prevent stockouts

items.name: Historical patterns
items.tactic: Look back 12 months. Identify seasonality (Jan spike, Aug dip). Regression model.

items.name: Trend detection
items.tactic: Product trending up/down? Viral moments = spike incoming. Prepare.

items.name: Inventory optimization
items.tactic: Forecast 30d. Order: forecast * 1.2 - current. Avoid overstock.

items.name: Stockout prevention
items.tactic: Forecast says sell week 2 → reorder week 1. Backorder if can't replenish.

items.name: Markdown timing
items.tactic: Overstock predicted? Discount early (recoup) vs late (clearance). ML optimal.
